title: Anti Xray
description: This is a simple resource pack which tries to prevent xray texture packs in 1.15+ when used as a server resource pack.
body: This is a simple resource pack which tries to prevent xray texture packs in 1.15+ when used as a server resource pack. This can be useful if there are no good ore obfuscation methods available for a new version/snapshot yet or if you just want to run a Vanilla server without any mods/plugins but still have some protection. It works in a way that restores the default models of the ores (in the lite version) or all blocks (in the full one, but that breaks custom models from other resource packs) without overriding any textures of other resource packs. That way only the custom models that make it possible to xray are blocked allowing your players to still use other local packs without xray functionality. If used as a server resource pack it will always override any other xray pack and apply the normal, non-see through blocks. You can then use [a plugin to force server resource packs](https://l.phoenix616.dev/frp) by kicking anyone who doesn't accept the pack download! (Or use 1.17's new required pack functionality) ## Screenshots ### Side-by-side comparison ![Anti Xray Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L6A5jvYc/images/fdc0a1caf307073e684c3d877f2fdd1624af9e79.png) --- ### Xray Just with an xray resource pack without any of my packs: ![Xray](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L6A5jvYc/images/d4a8e3fb652355df88fe5db2d20640e48eab317e.png) --- ### Anti Xray Full With the added **full** version of my pack. Completely stops see through blocks. Will break custom models of other packs: ![Anti Xray Full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L6A5jvYc/images/27589a66c42d24a122e34fb3f1e350bb5efd1987.png) This is the default download. If you have issues with items/blocks looking strange with your resource packs then try the lite version. --- ### Anti Xray Lite With the added **lite** version of my pack. Only hides ores. Best compatibility with other packs: ![Anti Xray Lite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L6A5jvYc/images/e284f5d56784544eee331cdb0dae1587da876543.png) To access the lite pack select the version you want from the [versions list](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/anti-xray-pack/versions) and download the second lite zip file under "Files": ![Screenshot of the Files section of a pack version showing the the full and lite zip files](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84dc9adc33a33b3bc72e4182c0bb742b0ade9db6.png) --- ## **Warning!** **Please note that this pack is not a 100% guarantee that your players wont be able to xray! There might be ways around this method. It also does not protect against xray mods! Use an obfuscater like the one built into [Paper](https://docs.papermc.io/paper/anti-xray) as soon as it's available!**
